initiatives.name: Pomona Hope Partners
initiatives.description: Community organization coordinating food distribution, urban gardening initiatives, and nutrition education programs through mutual aid networks to address food insecurity in Pomona.

initiatives.name:
Pomona Economic Opportunity
              Center
initiatives.description: Grassroots organization supporting day laborers and low-income residents through food distribution, resource sharing, and community empowerment programs.

initiatives.name: Protect Pomona Renters
initiatives.description: Tenant rights organization providing mutual aid support, legal resources, and community organizing for housing justice in Pomona.

initiatives.name: Pomona Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Local mutual aid network coordinating direct community support, resource distribution, and solidarity actions to meet immediate needs of Pomona residents.

initiatives.name: Pomona Community Care Network
initiatives.description: Grassroots coalition providing emergency assistance, healthcare access support, and community resources through mutual aid principles.

initiatives.name: Gente Organizada
initiatives.description: A community-led social action non-profit organization based in Pomona, CA whose mission is to organize to build intergenerational power and wellness for youth and immigrant families in Pomona.
